use_cases: Multi-step account creation flow with visual progress indication
User onboarding sequences showing verification status
Loading state display during async operations like account setup
Welcome screens for new users with animated step indicators
Wizard-style progress tracking for configuration processes
ai_summary: An animated onboarding card component that displays a three-step progress sequence (Welcome, Verifying, Complete) with a loading bar and spinning indicator. Features auto-cycling animations through each stage with checkmark icons for completed steps. Supports light/dark modes with neutral gradient backgrounds. Designed for SaaS applications and dev-tools requiring user onboarding flows.
